since_last: 82% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +2.12%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 82% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.73% · BTC +0.48% · Gold -0.56% · Nasdaq100 +1.10%. 82% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +2.12%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +2.12%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -46.35%
cards.body: Leaders: OKLO +5.64%, OKLO +5.64%, AVAV +4.83%, BIDU +4.05%, RXRX +3.98%. Laggards: HON -46.35%, MU -2.23%, DELL -2.22%, INTC -2.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.34% at $158.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
